title: She was an active participant: ED opposes Jacqueline Fernandez's plea to turn approver in PMLA case
description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) on Monday opposed a plea filed by Bollywood actor Jacqueline Fernandez to turn approver in the ₹200 crore money laundering case being probe by the Enforcement Directorate (ED). Last month, Fernandez had moved an application to become an approver in the case in which alleged conman Sukesh Chandrashekhar is the main accused. Fernandez was named in the case on allegations that she received expensive gifts from Chandrashekhar who was her boyfriend. Additional Session
